title: genista uniflora
intro: Genista uniflora, also known as the singleflower broom or broom thistle, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Genista uniflora include its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, and its ability to regulate blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Genista uniflora, including teas and tinctures, are typically made from the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems.
